cover: Dark blueprint system architecture diagram: 'Agent Script for Agentforce 2.0'. Deep dark navy blue (#0d1117) background with subtle glowing grid lines. Glowing neon blue bold header at top-center: 'Agent Script: Build Agents Like Software'. Subtitle below: 'From .agent files to AiAuthoringBundle metadata — version control for your Agentforce agents'. Top-right corner: circular avatar badge 'Bennie Joseph | Architect' (Indian male, beard, modern look). THREE BRIGHT LAYERS stacked vertically with glowing borders: LAYER 1 'Authoring Layer' bright cyan border: modules '.agent file', 'Agent Script LSP', 'sf agent preview' shown as bright white rounded pills. LAYER 2 'Runtime Layer' bright purple border: modules 'Agentforce 2.0', 'Atlas Reasoning Engine v2', 'Multi-Agent Orchestration' as bright pills. LAYER 3 'Enterprise Systems' bright green border: modules 'Salesforce API v64.0', 'Apex User Mode', 'Data 360 Retriever API' as bright pills. Central glowing node: 'AiAuthoringBundle' in white with neon glow and rotating arrows, dotted neon connectors to all layers. INTEGRATION box upper right with bright orange border: '@salesforce/mcp', 'MuleSoft API-to-MCP'. BOTTOM PANEL glowing teal: 'CI/CD Path — lint → preview sessions → deploy package' with bright flow arrows. Modern monospace font for code labels, sharp neon outlines, high contrast, publication-ready.
images: Dark blueprint developer infographic: 'Agent Script Turns Agents Into Reviewable Software'. Deep dark navy background, glowing neon blue header 'Agent Script Turns Agents Into Reviewable Software'. Subtitle 'Stop editing production agents by hand — define behavior in .agent files'. TOP ROW: 3 horizontal cards — 'Version Control with Git branch icon', 'Preview Sessions with terminal icon', 'Guardrails as Code with shield icon'. MIDDLE: side-by-side — LEFT red-themed box 'CLICK-ONLY AGENT CHANGES' with red DANGER pill, RIGHT green-themed box 'AGENT SCRIPT CHANGES' with green SUCCESS pill. CENTER: left column red border '// BAD' code: 'instructions = \"Help customers with anything\"\\nactions = [\"allTools\"]\\ngrounding = \"auto\"', right column green border '// GOOD' code: 'topic orderStatus {\\n  action getOrderStatus { access = \"user\" }\\n  requireCitation = true\\n}'. BOTTOM: circular avatar 'Bennie Joseph | Architect' + checklist 'Pull request review', 'Automated preview tests', 'AiAuthoringBundle deploy'. Footer bar: 'Agent behavior belongs in source control'. Monospace font for code, razor-sharp neon text, grid lines.

Dark blueprint developer infographic: 'CI Checks for Agent Script Deployments'. Deep dark navy background, glowing neon blue header 'CI Checks for Agent Script Deployments'. Subtitle 'Fail fast before an Agentforce agent reaches UAT'. TOP ROW: 3 horizontal cards — 'Lint .agent syntax with code brackets icon', 'Validate Apex action references with plug icon', 'Run preview sessions with chat bubble icon'. MIDDLE: side-by-side — LEFT red-themed box 'BROKEN PIPELINE' with red DANGER pill, RIGHT green-themed box 'SAFE PIPELINE' with green SUCCESS pill. CENTER: left column red border '// BAD' code: 'className = \"RefundAction\"\\nmethod = \"approveRefund\"\\n// RefundAction.cls missing', right column green border '// GOOD' code: 'if (!existsSync(apexClassPath)) {\\n  throw new Error(`Missing ${className}.cls`);\\n}'. BOTTOM: circular avatar 'Bennie Joseph | Architect' + checklist 'Agent Script lint', 'Apex tests pass', 'Preview scenario approved'. Footer bar: 'Do not ship agents you cannot validate'. Monospace font for code, razor-sharp neon text, grid lines.
